## Validation

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated documentation where needed
- [ ] I added or updated tests where needed
- [ ] I considered operational and security impact
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits and includes a scope
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits and include a scope
- [ ] If this PR targets `main`, the head branch is `develop`
- [ ] If deployable image references changed, the values file uses a digest
- [ ] If release notes should group this PR, the correct labels were applied
